summary: The contract state from a contract on the network
description: Returns a list of all contract's slots. If no timestamp is provided, returns the current state.

parameters.name: contractIdOrAddress
parameters.description: Contract or account identifier in format shard.realm.num, realm.num, num or a 20-byte EVM address (with or without 0x prefix).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The consensus timestamp of the contract state as a Unix timestamp in seconds.nanoseconds format with an optional comparison operator. See [unixtimestamp.com](https://www.unixtimestamp.com/) for a simple way to convert a date to the 'seconds' part of the Unix time.
